reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with better function-placement logic, stronger hybrid-architecture framing, and more useful degraded-mode best practices.
strengths: The article now explains why pure centralization and pure distribution are both uncommon in practice.
The edge-versus-center function discussion makes the architecture comparison more concrete and actionable.
The degraded-mode testing guidance improves the article beyond a generic pros-and-cons list.
summary_assessment: This version now passes. It is more architectural, more realistic, and better aligned with how mixed surveillance systems are actually designed.
